# /shared — Cross-Agent Data Handoffs

This folder is for simple data that multiple agents need to read/write.
No real-time sync — agents read/write files here for async data handoffs.

## Files (auto-generated by bots)
- `daily-products.json` — Product Scout output → read by Content Builder
- `opportunity-queue.json` — Hustle Bot output → read by CEO
- `trade-log.csv` — Trading Bot output → read by Analytics Bot
- `content-queue.json` — Content Builder output → read by Social Media Bot + Email Bot
- `lead-pipeline.json` — Real Estate Bot output → read by Closer + Analytics Bot
- `campaign-data.json` — Ad Creator output → read by Analytics Bot
